titleStmt.title: SII 4.949: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 949. (A.R. No. 132 of 1893). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśakava
¨rṣaṁbbulu 1693 yagunēṭi kharanāmasaṁhvatsara jyē
ṣṭha ba 5 [Ā] śrīmadbhōgādhivaṁśapārāvārā rākāsudhākaru
ṁḍḍunu tippānareḍḍiki prapautruṁḍḍunu mū¨rttireḍḍiki pau
truṁḍḍunu nāgi reḍḍiki suputruṁḍḍunu Aṁkkamāṁbbāgabhan®
śuktimauktikuṁḍḍunu veṁkkaṭarāmāvarajuṁḍḍunu jaggayyā
khyāggrajuṁḍḍunu bhrātṛvyāccaṁnnāhvayaparipālita
yovvarājyuṁḍḍunu nijasuguṇamaṇigṇamālikālaṁ
kṛtāśāṁgganābaṁdhurakaṁdharuṁḍḍagu subba(ṁ)nnadhātrīvaru
ṁḍḍu śrīmadgaṇapēśvaramahādēvaliṁggaṁbbunu sāṁ
gaṁbbugā śāśvatadharmaniṣṭhaṁ pratiṣṭhagāviṁ ccenū .
śrīmadbhōgādhivaṁśāmṛtanidhividhunā subbayakṣmādhipēnā śrī
nāgēśātmajēna prakaṭitayaśasā jaggayākhyāgrajēna . śrī
gāṇāpatyaliṁggaṁ sakalasurayutaṁ sthāpitaṁ jyēṣṭha
māsē paṁccamyāṁ kṛṣṇapakṣē kharaśaradiravē¨rvāsarē vaibhavēna .
śrīkāśācāri māgulūri mallikhā¨rjuḍu bhārya vīraṁ
mmā komāruḍu Akkābattuḍu nirmāṇaṁ cēśenū . © .
Digital edition of SII 4.949 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
